________________________ TestUserViewSet.test_user_update _______________________

self = <tests.test_views.TestUserViewSet testMethod=test_user_update>

    def test_user_update(self):
        user = UserFactory()
        response = self.client.patch(
            f"/api/users/{user.id}/",
            data={"name": "New Name"},
            format="json",
        )
>       assert response.status_code == 200
E       AssertionError: assert 403 == 200

        user = UserFactory()

>       assert response.status_code == 204
